extortion.description: [AI generated] Marriott International is a renowned multinational hospitality company, headquartered in Maryland, USA. Founded in 1927, it operates a broad portfolio of hotels and related lodging facilities globally. Offerings include diverse properties from luxury to economy chain brands. As of today, Marriott has more than 7,000 properties in over 130 countries and territories, making it one of the world's largest hotel companies.
